item.title: ASP.NET Software Developer
item.description:
What Is the role?

We are looking for a personal financial planning pro (Certified Financial Planner™ preferred) who will lead our client advising efforts. You will be a fiduciary who works with clients providing holistic advice on areas including: saving, retirement, debt management, investments. You’ll be on the front lines helping clients in what is arguably the most important position at the company.

item.title: Elements
item.description:
1. Heading 2
    1. Heading 3
      1. Heading 4
        1. Heading 5
    2. Emphasis
    3. Link
    4. Paragraph
    5. Ordered List
    6. Unordered List
    7. Notice
    8. Tab
    9. Collapse
    10. Code and Syntax Highlighting
    11. Blockquote
    12. Inline HTML
    13. Tables
    14. Image
    15. Gallery
    16. Youtube video
    17. Custom video

Here is an example of headings. You can use this heading by the following markdown rules. For example: use # for heading 1 and use ###### for heading 6.

item.title: Changelog
item.description:
v1.0 - Today

  • Process transactions.
  • Send emails and updates about Conclude
  • Perform any other function that we believe

v1.0 - Today

Send emails and updates about Conclude. Perform any other function that we believe.
